items.title: Meta, Microsoft look to trim workforces amid heavy AI spending
items.description: Meta told personnel in an internal memo on Thursday that it planned to cut 10% of workers.

items.title: People living in the U.S. with temporary protected status, targeted by Trump, are a $29 billion economic force
items.description: As the Supreme Court prepares to weigh the fate of TPS for Haitians and Syrians, a new report accounts for a demographic’s economic impact.

items.title: ‘Godmother of Silicon Valley’ Esther Wojcicki, mother of the YouTube and 23andMe CEOs, shares her secret to raising future leaders
items.description: Wojcicki takes inspiration from her daughters’ public failures and how they pivoted to turn mistakes into successful companies.

items.title: Pope Leo says he carries a photo of a slain Muslim boy in his pocket: ‘I cannot be in favor of war’
items.description: Leo also suggested that the U.S. church is excessively focused on sex.

items.title: ‘It was like this little gift that fell in my lap’: Millions of Americans may soon discover they’ve been Canadian all along
items.description: If you have a grandparent, great-grandparent or even more distant ancestor from Canada, you could be Canadian.
